---
title: "Global Health Initiative Autumn Symposium"
date: "2026-07-20"
draft: false
---

![](symposium_planetary_health_01.png)

![](symposium_planetary_health_02.png)

Weiter Infos [hier](https://tu-dresden.de/med/mf/ame/das-institut/news/global-health-initiative-autumn-symposium-2026)!
<!-- ![](1920_1005.png){width='80%'} -->

<!-- ![](info.png){width='80%'} -->
